alignments.candidate_evidence: Operations leader with eight years at Google scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs
alignments.job_requirement: Überwachung der Einhaltung betrieblicher Standards und Regelwerke

gaps.gap: No railway operations, safety, or Triebfahrzeugführer (locomotive driver) certification background
gaps.mitigation: Role is heavily specialized in German railway regulations and safety compliance; certification is a core hard requirement that cannot be acquired during employment

gaps.gap: Role requires field-based safety inspection and direct operational oversight; candidate background is strategy and transformation focused, not field operations or safety compliance
gaps.mitigation: Functional mismatch is fundamental; strategy ops experience does not transfer to hands-on safety inspection and regulatory compliance roles

gaps.gap: No demonstrated experience in transportation, logistics, regulatory compliance, or safety-critical operations
gaps.mitigation: Domain experience is absent; learning curve would be extensive and domain-critical

hard_blockers.evidence: Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Triebfahrzeugführer [Completed apprenticeship as locomotive driver]. This is a regulated, legally required qualification in Germany for railway operations safety roles. Candidate has no railway driver certification or equivalent transportation safety credential.

output.summary: This is a German railway safety inspector (Betriebskontrolleur) role requiring mandatory locomotive driver certification and deep railway operations expertise. The candidate is a Strategy & Operations leader with Google tech background; this role family, scope, domain, and regulatory requirements are fundamentally misaligned. Hard blocker: no Triebfahrzeugführer qualification.
